data.body: [operator-attested] One-time Jira link-direction repair: NO-OP — no inverted links exist to correct. Live audit on 2026-07-16 classified all 315 depends_on relationships (every pair with both endpoints bound, from the rebar store) against live Jira via REST (GET /rest/api/3/issue/<key>?fields=issuelinks): result = 315 correct / 0 reversed / 0 absent / 0 errors. Spot-verified REB-1 (REB-283 Blocks REB-1 = correct) and the exact cycle-warning cluster REB-832/30ff + siblings REB-833..837 (all correctly oriented). The defect is latent (buggy outbound dedup-skips existing correct links; it would only reverse a brand-new depends_on link synced fresh) — the 07-14 cycle-warning evidence was stale and has since resolved. Therefore no Jira mutation was performed or needed; the code fix (Gerrit 739) prevents future reversal.
